allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/supabase_schema.json'\)\); tables=sorted\(d.get\('definitions',{}\).keys\(\)\); print\('Tables/Views:', len\(tables\)\); [print\(' -', t\) for t in tables]; print\('\\n--- RPCs ---'\); rpcs=[p for p in d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\) if p.startswith\('/rpc/'\)]; print\('RPCs:', len\(rpcs\)\); [print\(' -', r.replace\('/rpc/',''\)\) for r in sorted\(rpcs\)]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/supabase_schema.json'\); const t=Object.keys\(d.definitions||{}\).sort\(\); console.log\('Tables/Views:',t.length\); t.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x\)\); const r=Object.keys\(d.paths||{}\).filter\(p=>p.startsWith\('/rpc/'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\('\\\\nRPCs:',r.length\); r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x.replace\('/rpc/',''\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('C:/Users/DEBDUTTA/AppData/Local/Temp/supabase_schema.json'\); const t=Object.keys\(d.definitions||{}\).sort\(\); console.log\('Tables/Views:',t.length\); t.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x\)\); const r=Object.keys\(d.paths||{}\).filter\(p=>p.startsWith\('/rpc/'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\('RPCs:',r.length\); r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(' -',x.replace\('/rpc/',''\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('C:/Users/DEBDUTTA/AppData/Local/Temp/supabase_schema.json'\); Object.keys\(d.definitions||{}\).sort\(\).forEach\(name=>{ const def=d.definitions[name]; const cols=Object.keys\(def.properties||{}\); console.log\('\\\\n['+name+']'\); cols.forEach\(c=>{const p=def.properties[c]; console.log\('  '+c+': '+\(p.type||p.format||'?'\)+\(p.format?' \('+p.format+'\)':''\)\);}\); }\);")
